title: lamium ponticum subsp. anatolicum
intro: Lamium ponticum subsp. anatolicum, also known as Anatolian spotted dead nettle, is a subspecies of the Lamium genus, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lamium ponticum subsp. anatolicum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to treat various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
